name: hi_flow-marketplace
description: Marketplace for hi_flow Three-Phase Flow methodology skills (product spec, architecture spec, implementation plan, fitness functions, session handoff) for solo+AI development

plugins.name: hi_flow
plugins.description: Three-Phase Flow methodology for solo+AI development — design phases 0-2 plus deterministic hygiene gates for phase 3. Five skills: product-spec (product decomposition + per-product backlog), feature-spec (feature-level product spec via 8-category probing taxonomy + HAZOP guidewords + premortem), and the Phase-2 trio arch-audit (architecture analysis), arch-redesign (corrective refactor planning), arch-spec (per-feature architectural design, bridge to implementation). Phase-3 implementation methodology is delegated to the superpowers ecosystem; hi_flow adds the architecture and hygiene layer. Roadmap: bootstrap + living-architecture (architecture-document management) + L3 hygiene enforcement.
